---
title: "3_Data_Filter_London_LSOA_Boundaries"
---

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Load packages
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(tmap)
```

```{r}
# LSOA for whole Great Britian
lsoa_gb <- st_read("Lower_layer_Super_Output_Areas_December_2021_Boundaries_EW_BFC_V10/LSOA_2021_EW_BFC_V10.shp")
# London Boundary 
london_boundary <- st_read("gla/London_GLA_Boundary.shp")

# Ensure both have the same CRS
london_boundary <- st_transform(london_boundary, st_crs(lsoa_gb))
```

```{r}
# Centroids of LSOAs across GB
lsoa_centroids <- st_centroid(lsoa_gb)
```

```{r}
# Centroids within the London boundary
lsoa_london <- lsoa_gb[st_within(lsoa_centroids, london_boundary, sparse = FALSE), ]
```

```{r}
# Check number of LSOAs in the clipped: should be ~4,994
nrow(lsoa_london) 
```

```{r}
qtm(lsoa_london)
```

```{r}
# Save as shapefile
st_write(lsoa_london, "lsoa_london/lsoa_london.shp")
```
